# tasks.md — Generated vs Engineer-Implements Breakdown

> Loaded by `/tasks`. Splits the work into what /accelerator.generate produces
> automatically vs what the engineer must implement by hand.

## Auto-generated by /accelerator.generate
- [ ] Agent classes (ADK) from adk_agent_tree
- [ ] MCP client + A2A client wiring from tool_bindings
- [ ] FunctionTool stubs from business_rules (logic = requires_review)
- [ ] Model Armor callbacks from screening_config
- [ ] Per-agent Workload Identity from agent_identity_config
- [ ] Terraform from infra_modules (company modules only — Constitution Rule 4)
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline configs + pre-commit eval hook (Constitution Rule 11)
- [ ] OTel spans + structured logging (Constitution Rules 14-15)
- [ ] /health + /ready endpoints (Constitution Rule 13)
- [ ] golden-dataset.json seed from spec §10 (Constitution Rule 12)

## Engineer implements (the ~5-10% manual work)
- [ ] System prompts per agent (domain expertise, tone, persona)
- [ ] FunctionTool predicate bodies (verify against spec §7)
- [ ] Eval dataset curation beyond the seed
- [ ] Proprietary algorithms not expressible as IF/THEN rules
- [ ] Edge cases the spec didn't cover
